name: AUTO M&F Soft Reset - Treatment, Dinner & Stay (Voucher)
externalName: M&F Soft Reset - Treatment, Dinner & Stay
description: Give the gift of a new year's reset to your favourite person, or treat yourself to some ‘me time’, with our exclusive SOFT RESET Package. Designed to restore balance after the festive season, this stay combines great food, restorative rest and a touch of self-care. Available exclusively throughout January and February. Settle into a private en-suite studio, spend your first evening dinning at the Lemonia restaurant with a £50 credit towards food & drink, with a help-yourself breakfast in the morning. A 60-minute treatment for one or 30 minute treatments for two during your stay - with 'The Grounding' full-body Massage, Deep Roots Massage or 'From The Ground Up' treatments to choose from. The perfect way to ease into the year feeling lighter and brighter. This rate includes: • Overnight stay with breakfast; • £50 credit for food & drink at the Lemonia restaurant - must be used on your first evening of your stay; • A 60-minute treatment for one or 30 minute for two during your stay - additional time can be added, our team will reach out to book a time to suit. • Available for stays in January & February only. • Full payment required at the time of booking. Non-refundable and non-amendable.
